leadText: Dynite Ore (Japanese: マックスこうせき Max Ore) is a type of item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] A trader inside the Max Lair will give certain items to the player in exchange for pieces of Dynite Ore. Peonia will sometimes offer to unlock a Dynamax Adventure leading to a special Pokémon the player has not seen yet in exchange for five pieces of Dynite Ore. If the player drops out of three or more Dynamax Adventures in a row, the Scientist running the Max Lair demands the player give her a number of Dynite Ore pieces equal to the amount of Dynamax Adventures they've dropped out of (up to 10) before letting them participate in another one. An old man near the crop plots in Freezington will give the player Carrot Seeds in exchange for eight pieces of Dynite Ore.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods Sw Sh CT Snowslide Slope Watt Trader (Highlight Item, 1,980 W ) Hidden recurring item ( Slippery Slope , Roaring-Sea Caves ) Max Lair ( Dynamax Adventure reward) Max Raid Battles (all levels) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period Sw Sh Japanese Pokemon Scraps 2020 Japanese November 20, 2020 to April 30, 2021 Gigantamax Pikachu Max Raid Battle items All February 26 to 28, 2021 Pokémon Adventure 25 items South Korea April 26 to September 30, 2021

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V Mysterious ore that can be obtained in the Max Lair. Something good will happen if you give it to a collector in the Crown Tundra.
